overview: Maddox Is That You is a browser arcade hub featuring 4 fully playable mini-games: Golf Orbit, Space Shooter, Snake, and Flappy Bird. Launch any game from the main menu, rack up a high score, and see it saved permanently.
features: Main menu hub with 4 game tiles
Golf Orbit — aim and shoot with power/angle controls
Space Shooter — dodge and destroy descending enemies
Flappy Bird — tap to fly through pipes
Persistent high scores stored in the backend
